FAQ

What is rush?

Rush is the process of meeting brothers, attending events, and deciding whether Pi Kappa Phi is the right fit.

Do I need prior experience?

No. We look for character, ambition, social awareness, and willingness to contribute.

How much does membership cost?

Dues vary by semester. Submit the rush form and our team can walk you through current costs clearly.

What is the time commitment?

Expect weekly chapter activity, brotherhood events, service opportunities, and rush events during recruitment.

What makes Pi Kappa Phi different?

A balance of brotherhood, leadership, philanthropy, campus involvement, and alumni connections.
